Interface CollisionProvider

All Superinterfaces:
AlgorithmProvider, Backend
All Known Subinterfaces:
MechanicsBackend, NativeCollisionProvider
All Known Implementing Classes:
CPUCollisionProvider, GenesisBackend, NativeBulletBackend, NativeCollisionBackend, NativeJBulletBackend, ODEBackend
public interface CollisionProvider extends AlgorithmProvider, Backend
Interface for high-performance collision detection and physics simulation.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Object
    createBackend()
    Creates and returns the backend instance (or returns self if it is the backend).
    int
    detectSphereCollisions(double[] positions, double[] radii, int n, int[] collisions)
    Performs collision detection between spheres.
    default String
    getAlgorithmType()
    Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the execution priority (higher is better).
    default String
    getType()
    Returns the backend type category (e.g., "plotting", "molecular", "tensor", "math").
    default boolean
    isAvailable()
    Checks if the provider is available in the current environment.
    void
    resolveCollisions(double[] positions, double[] velocities, double[] masses, int n, int[] collisions, int numCollisions)
    Resolves collisions by updating velocities.
    default void
    shutdown()
    Called when the provider is no longer needed (e.g., application shutdown).

    getMetadata, getName, score

    • shutdown

      default void shutdown()
      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
      Called when the provider is no longer needed (e.g., application shutdown). Use this to release local resources or close native segments.
      Specified by:
      shutdown in interface AlgorithmProvider
      Specified by:
      shutdown in interface Backend

    • getAlgorithmType

      default String getAlgorithmType()
      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
      Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
      Specified by:
      getAlgorithmType in interface AlgorithmProvider

    • detectSphereCollisions

      int detectSphereCollisions(double[] positions, double[] radii, int n, int[] collisions)
      Performs collision detection between spheres.
      Parameters:
      positions - Flattened array [x0, y0, z0, x1, y1, z1, ...]
      radii - Array of radii [r0, r1, ...]
      n - Number of spheres
      collisions - Output array for collision pairs [idA, idB, ...]
      Returns:
      Number of collisions found

    • resolveCollisions

      void resolveCollisions(double[] positions, double[] velocities, double[] masses, int n, int[] collisions, int numCollisions)
      Resolves collisions by updating velocities.
      Parameters:
      positions - Positions array
      velocities - Velocities array
      masses - Masses array
      n - Number of spheres
      collisions - Collisions array
      numCollisions - Number of collision pairs
